global.title: Global EV sales hit 1.8 million in May as Europe races ahead
global.summary: Global EV sales reached 1.8 million units in May 2026, according to new data from Benchmark Mineral Intelligence, bringing total sales for the first five months of the year to 7.5 million vehicles.

global.title: Toyota reveals prices for its first electric pickup
global.summary: The Hilux BEV arrives as Toyota’s first fully electric pickup and body-on-frame EV. Is it worth the price?

global.title: BYD is taking its luxury electric GT on an over 9,300-mile trip from Europe to Asia
global.summary: The Denza GT Z9 can drive over 600 miles, fast charge in under 10 minutes, and hit 0 to 62 mph in 2.7 seconds. Now, BYD’s luxury EV is following in the footsteps of Marco Polo as it embarks on an over 9,300-mile (15,000 km) trip from Rome to Hong Kong.

global.title: Jackery 5,040Wh power station + 2x 500W solar panels new $3,905 low, Anker SOLIX exclusive flash sale deals from $569, Navee, more
global.summary: We’ve got a bunch of power station deals kicking off this week’s Green Deals, starting with Jackery’s combined Early Prime Father’s Day Sale that is offering a 72-hour flash sale window on three units, including the 5,040Wh Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station with 2x 500W solar panels at a new

global.title: BMW’s new iX3 is a range monster, but the iX5 may push past 500 miles
global.summary: The first electric iX5 will have a massive battery, the largest in a BMW EV yet, that could offer a range of over 500 miles on a single charge.

global.title: Tesla’s self-driving safeguards fooled by $30 doll heads
global.summary: A cottage industry has emerged on Chinese e-commerce platforms selling tiny plastic doll heads designed to trick Tesla’s cabin camera into thinking a driver is paying attention. The devices cost as little as $20 to $50. The products — marketed as “travel companions” and “dashboard decorations” — rep

global.title: Tesla Cybercab full specs revealed: 3,113 lbs, 219 HP, 48 kWh
global.summary: Tesla’s Cybercab EPA certification documents reveal the robotaxi’s full technical specs for the first time — including a 3,113-lb curb weight, a 219 HP motor, and a 48 kWh battery pack. The filing confirms several claims Tesla made about the vehicle while revealing some surprises. The Certificate Su

global.title: Ford has a ‘secret’ website for its $30,000 EV pickup, revealing a closer look
global.summary: That low-cost electric Ford pickup we’re all waiting for now has a dedicated website that offers a sneak peek at the upcoming EV.

global.title: Kia’s electric van is about to get a big brother: Here’s our first look at the PV7 [Images]
global.summary: Kia’s first electric van has quickly become a fan favorite. With the larger PV7 coming soon, will it have the same impact?

global.title: Ariel Rider Kepler review: A big, safe, fat tire commuter e-bike with style
global.summary: Ten years ago, if you had told me that I’d be riding what I would soon call an “excellent commuter e-bike” despite it weighing 118 pounds (53.5 kg) and rolling on 24×4.0-inch fat tires, I probably would have laughed.
